info.title: SeamQ.Cli
info.description: Static analysis tool for Angular workspace interface boundaries. Detects seams, generates ICDs, PlantUML diagrams, and API documentation.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: seamq — static analysis tool for angular workspace interface boundaries

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan workspaces and build the seam registry

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description: One or more workspace root paths

arguments.name: seam-id
arguments.description: Seam ID to generate ICD for

arguments.name: seam-id
arguments.description: Seam ID to generate diagrams for

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Print detailed contract surface for a seam
